trial.rationale: UTV2-1533: post-lock ramp step 2 (12-14 lane ceiling). PM enables only after the 10-lane base wave (v3) has run healthy — no ghost-lane spike, no repeated stale-lease/substrate-guard failures, merge-train drain rate holding, CI/review delay not growing — per docs/governance/LANE_CONCURRENCY_POLICY.md §6. PM enables by setting enabled=true and allowed_until ISO date. Reverts automatically when allowed_until is in the past.
